name: United Arab Emirates
summary: Day 85 of Hormuz blockade (Saturday May 23). **UAE BARAKAH DAY 6 OF 14 — IRAQ JOINT PROBE NOW UNDER NEW IRAQI PM ALI AL ZAIDI (BLOOMBERG MAY 21: APPEARS 'TO ALIGN WITH US PRESIDENT DONALD TRUMP'S GOAL OF LIMITING IRAN'S INFLUENCE IN THE OPEC NATION'). NEW IRAQI GOVERNMENT IS UNDER 'INCREASING PRESSURE FROM THE US TO REIN IN IRAN-BACKED MILITIAS.' THE INVESTIGATIVE TRACK PRESERVES UAE MEDIATION SPACE WHILE STRUCTURALLY PIVOTING THE TARGET-JURISDICTION + INVESTIGATIVE AUTHORITY DYNAMIC.** (1) The National (UAE) running restrained coverage of the Pakistan-deal-text leak architecture + Munir COAS Tehran visit — preserves Barakah-attack mediation space. (2) Three-Gulf-leader editorial coordination intact: Al Arabiya (deal-text leak + Saudi FM Faisal bin Farhan publicly praising Trump+Pakistan) — Saudi takes deal credit; Al Jazeera (Israel-as-spoiler frame) — Qatar; The National (UAE restraint). (3) **UAE Barakah trigger ('Iran formal acknowledgement or denial within 14 days by 2026-05-31') remains `watching` Day 6 of 14** — Iran neither acknowledged nor denied. (4) **UAE LEAVING OPEC May 1** removes 3M+ bpd theoretical spare capacity from cartel arithmetic. (5) **No fresh kinetic incident on UAE territory or vessels via UAE waters May 22-23**. (6) **Trajectory bifurcation thesis holds**: Saudi-Iran has converted to investigative architecture; UAE-Iran following same path via Iraq joint probe under new US-aligned Iraqi PM — both moving toward Helsinki-pact-style architectural restraint. PRIOR (May 22): **UAE BARAKAH DAY 5 OF 14 — IRAQ JOINT PROBE OF SAUDI+UAE DRONE STRIKES IS THE OPERATIONAL DIPLOMATIC DELIVERABLE; UAE PRESERVES MEDIATION SPACE; HELSINKI-PACT ARCHITECTURE HOLDS. UAE LEAVING OPEC MAY 1 ALREADY ENCODED — REMOVES 3M+ BPD THEORETICAL SPARE CAPACITY FROM CARTEL'S SPARE-CAPACITY ARITHMETIC.** (1) **Iraq joint probe (CONFIRMED — Bloomberg May 21 primary)**: Iraq set to jointly probe drone strikes on UAE and Saudi Arabia. FDD's Long War Journal (May 20) confirms UAE and Saudi Arabia jointly attribute the strikes to Iraqi-origin drones. UAE Barakah trigger ('Iran formal acknowledgement or denial within 14 days by 2026-05-31') remains `watching` Day 5 of 14 — Iran neither acknowledged nor denied. **Investigative channel preserves UAE mediation optionality on the parallel Iran-deal track** — rolling into Iraq joint probe with Saudi maintains UAE's restrained posture relative to the Pakistan-mediation deal architecture. (2) **The National (UAE) coverage is restrained** in the Pakistan-deal-text leak architecture — UAE preserves Barakah-attack mediation space. Three-Gulf-leader editorial coordination (MbS + Tamim + MbZ) operational through three different channels: Al Arabiya (deal-text leak — Saudi), Al Jazeera (Israel-as-spoiler frame — Qatar), The National (restraint — UAE). (3) **UAE LEAVING OPEC May 1** (already encoded) continues to remove 3M+ bpd of theoretical spare capacity from the cartel's spare-capacity arithmetic (EIA cut OPEC 2027 spare capacity forecast to 2.5M b/d from 3.8M b/d per intel B7). The physical-vs-paper bifurcation persists. (4) **No fresh kinetic incident on UAE territory or vessels via UAE waters across May 20-22**. (5) **Markets / structural read**: Saudi-UAE-Pakistan-Qatar Gulf-mediation architecture is at maximum operational expression; UAE positioned as the restrained mediation-space-preserver while Saudi (Al Arabiya leak) takes editorial ownership of the deal text. **Trajectory bifurcation thesis holds**: Saudi-Iran trajectory has converted from kinetic (March covert strikes) to investigative (Iraq joint probe); UAE-Iran trajectory is following the same path via Iraq joint probe — both moving toward Helsinki-pact-style architectural restraint. PRIOR (May 19 — Monday): **MAJOR — UAE BARAKAH NUCLEAR ENERGY PLANT PERIMETER STRIKE SUNDAY MAY 17**: UAE Ministry of Defence confirmed 3 drones entered UAE from western border, 2 intercepted, **1 caused fire at electrical generator outside the inner perimeter of Barakah Nuclear Energy Plant in Al Dhafra**. IAEA expressed 'grave concern'; radiation levels normal; all units operating. **First nuclear-infrastructure-adjacent kinetic incident of cycle** (even at perimeter, not core, the symbolism is categorically new). Pair with Saudi drone interception Sunday May 17 (3 drones from Iraqi airspace) — coordinated Iraqi-militia/Iran-aligned proxy harassment of GCC territory on the same weekend as Trump-Netanyahu coordination + Trump 'clock is ticking' + NYT preparation report. UAE MoFA formal condemnation May 18 of Saudi drone intercept = GCC bloc messaging unity. **The Barakah strike validates the prior structural reading that UAE remains the most kinetically exposed Gulf state in the cycle** — Iran's 'punishment of US-aligned host' pattern intensifies. **Markets dossier C1 proposes uae-barakah-nuclear-plant as new node creation candidate** (6+ independent sources, IAEA primary, first nuclear-infrastructure kinetic of cycle); creating node today. **PRIOR (May 17): UAE LEG OF MODI 5-NATION TOUR OPERATIONALLY COMPLETE — UAE NOW EN ROUTE TO EUROPE (Netherlands → Sweden → Norway → Italy); NO Saudi Arabia leg on this tour** (disambiguation: 'PM Modi lands in Jeddah' headlines circulating refer to April 22, 2025 visit, NOT May 2026). Modi-MBZ MoUs from May 15 (ISPRL-ADNOC strategic petroleum reserve + LPG framework + $5B UAE investment + defence framework) carry forward as operational anchors. **Gulf News (Dubai-based) led with 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0' kinetic framing — THE MOST DIRECT GULF-PRESS AMPLIFICATION OF THE NYT PREPARATION STORY** ('US and Israel Weigh Kharg Island Strike, Uranium Seizure Mission in Iran Amid War Fears'). Dubai economy depends on stability, so this is Dubai pricing risk loudly into local awareness — consistent with UAE's hawkish-on-Iran posture FT framed yesterday. **The National (Abu Dhabi)** likely on more restrained line given the diplomatic-cable function; pending Sunday publication. **Saudi-UAE divergence deepened**: Arab News continues Helsinki pact framing (Riyadh de-escalation); Gulf News leads kinetic-preparation (Dubai pricing risk into Iran tail-risk). **A7 SAUDI HELSINKI PACT PROPOSAL Day 3 of 30** — no formal Saudi MFA confirmation; UAE-Saudi divergence remains the structural complication; UAE is NOT a sponsor of the pact. No fresh UKMTO advisory on Hui Chuan through May 17 morning. UAE remains the only confirmed third combatant per WSJ Lavan disclosure. **PRIOR (May 16):** MODI-MBZ MoUs SIGNED MAY 15 — ISPRL-ADNOC strategic petroleum reserve (30 MILLION BARRELS ADNOC storage in Indian SPR at Visakhapatnam + Chandikhol + reciprocal Indian crude storage at FUJAIRAH on Gulf of Oman OUTSIDE Hormuz); long-term LPG framework IndianOil-ADNOC; UAE $5 BILLION INVESTMENT COMMITMENT to India; defence framework** (CONFIRMED — Business Standard, The Tribune, The Wire, IBTimes India, BusinessToday, India TV). Modi: 'We condemned the attacks on the UAE' (explicit framing of architecture as response to Iran-Hormuz disruption). **The Fujairah-storage component is the operational confirmation of the alternative-route engineering yesterday's brief described as 'publicly disclosed' — today the disclosure became an operational instrument.** **MAJOR COMPLICATION: SAUDI ARABIA FLOATED HELSINKI-ACCORDS-MODELLED NON-AGGRESSION PACT FOR IRAN + REGIONAL STATES** (FT primary May 14; MEE/Haaretz/Arab News amplification); EU institutions explicitly backing. **The FT explicitly flagged 'the emerging rivalry between Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates has put the two most powerful Gulf countries on opposite sides of a growing number of issues, including over the region's post-war relationship with Tehran.'** Gulf-press differential framing now shows the divergence in real time: Arab News leads with the pact (Riyadh-friendly); The National (UAE) leads with the Modi-MBZ MoU signing (Abu-Dhabi-friendly) — different stories, different priorities, same crisis. **No fresh UKMTO advisory through May 16 morning on Hui Chuan (Honduras-flagged vessel seized off Fujairah May 14); Iran has not commented; no UAE foreign-ministry response.** UAE remains the only confirmed third combatant per WSJ Lavan disclosure (Saudi-Iran de-escalation per Reuters is bifurcating UAE's trajectory). PRIOR (May 15): **B3 MODI-MBZ ABU DHABI MEETING TODAY: LPG + STRATEGIC PETROLEUM RESERVE MoUs TO BE SIGNED; FUJAIRAH EXPANSION ALTERNATIVE-ROUTE PLAN PUBLICLY DISCLOSED** (CONFIRMED — Business Standard, The Tribune, India TV, Khaleej Times, The National, DD News). PM Modi arrived in Abu Dhabi May 15 for talks with Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan — second face-to-face in five months. India and UAE expected to sign two MoUs on LPG supplies and Strategic Petroleum Reserves, addressing India's vulnerability that ~90% of LPG imports and ~55% of crude oil imports transited Hormuz 'during peacetime.' **UAE MINISTER OF INDUSTRY SULTAN AL JABER: 'energy has been weaponised by Hormuz being taken hostage effectively, we are responsible player in energy space'** = cleanest Gulf-state public language framing Hormuz situation as weaponisation by Iran. Two countries have explored alternatives including (a) Indian vessels loading more oil and LPG shipments from Port of Fujairah in Gulf of Oman, (b) expansion of Fujairah oil terminal capacity, (c) UAE laying additional cross-peninsula pipeline. **This is operational alternative-route planning being publicly disclosed for the first time.** The National (Abu Dhabi) carried Modi's arrival favourably and quoted Al Jaber's 'Hormuz being taken hostage effectively' line — cleanest UAE-government weaponisation framing of Iran in the cycle. Khaleej Times led with LPG and Strategic Petroleum Reserve cooperation. **B1 HUI CHUAN SEIZURE OFF FUJAIRAH MAY 14**: Honduras-flagged vessel taken by 'unauthorised personnel whilst at anchor' 38nm NE of Fujairah, reportedly bound for Iranian territorial waters (UKMTO primary CONFIRMED ACTION; REPORTED on Iranian destination; NO claim of responsibility, NO UAE foreign-ministry response at filing). Cycle's second confirmed Iranian-direction seizure on a vessel previously at anchor in UAE waters. **PRIOR (May 14): Iran FM Araghchi used Delhi platform to directly threaten UAE from BRICS-FM table; UAE foreign ministry institutional silence continues — multi-day pattern.** Saudi-Iran trajectory now bifurcating from UAE-Iran trajectory: Riyadh exited kinetic engagement (Reuters: Saudi-Iran de-escalation took effect 'in the week before' April 7 broader ceasefire); UAE remains fully active third-combatant conflict surface with no de-escalation understanding disclosed. The National separately ran the Kharg-slick story with explicit non-attribution to Iran. Modi's UAE visit politically loaded: hosts an Iranian FM threatening UAE from Delhi soil one day before flying there. **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI USED DELHI PLATFORM TO DIRECTLY THREATEN UAE FROM BRICS-FM TABLE MAY 14**: 'Iranian FM threatens UAE, claims Tehran knew of Netanyahu's visit to Abu Dhabi' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). Araghchi sat at BRICS table on Indian soil with India's FM and China's FM and publicly threatened UAE (a confirmed third combatant per WSJ Lavan disclosure). **UAE has NOT publicly responded to Araghchi's Delhi threat at filing time.** UAE foreign ministry institutional silence continues — multi-day pattern (4 days since UAE Lavan disclosure; UAE-state-aligned media treating both Lavan + Saudi-strikes stories as something to wait out). Modi flies to UAE May 15 — first leg of 5-nation tour. **Modi's UAE visit is now choreographically loaded**: hosts an Iranian FM threatening UAE from Delhi soil one day before flying there. India strategic-autonomy-as-multi-vector-channel framing operationally tested in next 48 hours. **A10 REUTERS NOW AMPLIFIES THE SAUDI-STRIKES STORY (was Newsweek/WSJ-only cluster yesterday) — Reuters May 12-13 cited 'two Western officials and two Iranian officials'**: 'Saudi Arabia made Iran aware of the strikes and this was followed by intensive diplomatic engagement and Saudi threats to retaliate further, which led to an understanding between the two countries to **de-escalate**.' SAUDI-IRAN TRAJECTORY IS NOW BIFURCATING FROM UAE-IRAN TRAJECTORY: Riyadh has paid the price of engagement and exited; **Abu Dhabi remains operationally engaged**. The UAE-Iran trajectory remains a fully active third-combatant conflict surface with no de-escalation understanding disclosed. The National (Abu Dhabi) ran 'Why Indian PM Modi's UAE visit matters beyond bilateral headlines' May 14 with energy-security framing and **ZERO engagement of UAE's confirmed combatant role** — most overt example of Gulf-press kid-gloves treatment of items politically inconvenient to Gulf-state visiting-party narrative. Khaleej Times ran energy-pacts framing (LPG, strategic petroleum reserve cooperation). The National separately ran the Kharg-slick story with explicit non-attribution to Iran ('where did it come from?'). Modi's UAE visit complicated by both Iran's de facto kinetic-combatant designation of UAE AND today's Araghchi-on-Indian-soil-threatening-UAE optics. PRIOR (May 13): **A10 NEWSWEEK + WSJ + 2 WESTERN OFFICIALS + 2 IRANIAN OFFICIALS REPORTED MAY 12-13: SAUDI ARABIA LAUNCHED SECRET STRIKES AGAINST IRAN IN LATE MARCH ('tit-for-tat retaliation when Saudi was hit') ON TOP OF YESTERDAY'S UAE-LAVAN WSJ DISCLOSURE (April 8 Mirage 2000-9 attack). Newsweek also reports Iran has fired >2,800 missiles/drones at UAE territory CUMULATIVELY — MORE THAN AT ANY OTHER COUNTRY — Iran's prior 'punishment of US-aligned host' framing against UAE is now confirmed retaliation against a fully kinetic third combatant. ONE OF THE UAE LAVAN-RESPONSE STRIKES IS REPORTED AS 'COORDINATED WITH ISRAEL.' Saudi has not publicly acknowledged late-March strikes; Iran has not commented; Al Hadath (Saudi) ran editorial distance language on UAE story but has not engaged the Saudi-strikes claim. The Gulf-alignment graph now requires Saudi to move from 'OPEC+/balancing/underwriter' toward partial kinetic participant — STRUCTURAL RE-ENCODING OF ENTIRE GULF ROW.** **Modi arrives in UAE May 15 and in this new context his Gulf-cousin visit lands in a more politically loaded environment than even yesterday's reading anticipated.** Iran FM Araghchi will land in New Delhi for BRICS May 13-14 (sees Modi May 14 same day Trump in Beijing) — see iran node. **Khaleej Times ran Modi UAE-visit piece factually focused on energy security with ZERO editorial framing of UAE's recently-disclosed combatant role; The National (Abu Dhabi) ran Trump-Beijing trip 'overshadowed by Iran war' but again did NOT engage Lavan disclosure or new Saudi-strikes claim — same kid-gloves silence as yesterday. UAE state-aligned media treating both stories as something to wait out.** No Indian outlet has editorialised against Modi visiting UAE knowing UAE struck Iran — diaspora-base in UAE (~3.5M Indians) makes anti-UAE framing politically unworkable. Iran-side prior UAE-targeted strikes are the implicit operational response (CONFIRMED ACTION); explicit Iranian re-attribution NOT made publicly. PRIOR CONTEXT (May 12): **B6 WSJ REVELATION MAY 11 (MAJOR): UAE AIR FORCE SECRETLY CARRIED OUT AIRSTRIKES INSIDE IRAN DURING THE WAR, INCLUDING AN APRIL 8 STRIKE ON THE LAVAN ISLAND OIL REFINERY (Persian Gulf, 55,000 bpd capacity, knocked offline for months) USING MIRAGE 2000-9 AIRCRAFT.** UAE has not publicly acknowledged. Washington reportedly 'positively received' Abu Dhabi's participation. **REFRAMES ENTIRE REGIONAL ALIGNMENT PICTURE: UAE moves from 'passive US host with hawkish air defense' to THE ONLY THIRD COUNTRY TO JOIN US-ISRAEL KINETIC OPERATIONS AGAINST IRAN.** Iran's prior March/April UAE-targeted missile and drone strikes — previously framed as Iran 'targeting US-aligned Gulf hosts' — are now retroactively contextualized as DIRECT RETALIATION for confirmed covert UAE participation in offensive ops on Iran. Saudi Arabia, by contrast, denied via Al-Hadath May 8 that it allowed offensive airspace use — visibly distancing. **UAE silent on WSJ exposure; The National (UAE state-aligned) conspicuously absent from leading the Lavan story — ran a piece headlined 'Trump heads to Beijing... overshadowed by Iran war' but did NOT amplify WSJ's revelation. UAE state-aligned media treating WSJ scoop as something to wait out, not engage. Iran silent on WSJ exposure (the operational response IS the prior UAE-targeted strikes, retroactively reframed); Khaleej Times continued straight reporting on UAE-Iran kinetic events but did not editorialize.** Gulf-state alignment fracture is now visible: UAE (only third combatant, covertly), Saudi (deniable-operational + public-pro-mediation, distancing from UAE military track), Qatar (mediating with IRGC contacts), Bahrain (US-aligned counter-IRGC), Kuwait (denied airspace), Oman (silent). **Iran on May 8 retaliated against UAE with 2 ballistic + 3 drones (3 wounded confirmed) — now retroactively readable as response to UAE's role.** **Modi 5-nation tour May 15-20 (UAE-Netherlands-Sweden-Norway-Italy) — India is engaging with only third combatant nation simultaneously with diversification framing; UAE leg materially complicated by Lavan revelation.** UAE airspace partial closure post-Fujairah ended on/around May 11 (PRE-confirmed timeline). The Saudi-UAE structural overhang persists.

active_triggers.condition: UAE enters war as combatant (not just defensive)
UAE adds 500K-1M bpd of supply within 6 months of OPEC exit (May 1) confirming Atlantic Council/Derentz medium-term-bearish thesis
Saudi Arabia issues formal public response to UAE OPEC exit within 14 days (by 2026-05-12)

recent_signals.headline: **UAE MBZ ONE OF THREE GULF LEADERS REQUESTING TRUMP POSTPONE THE MAY 19 STRIKE — CONFIRMED VIA TRUMP TRUTH SOCIAL POST.** UAE's Barakah Day 2 of 14 negative-space: Iran has NOT acknowledged or denied responsibility through Tuesday morning IST; UAE itself publicly investigating and reserving formal attribution. **The same UAE that hosted a kinetic strike on a nuclear-adjacent facility on May 17 is brokering the postponement of US kinetic action on May 18-19** — a structural signal about Gulf preference for negotiation over escalation even after a nuclear-symbolic incident. The UAE's mediating posture is more important to MbZ than the attribution-prosecution posture would be. The National (UAE) focused on Barakah follow-up and UAE's role in the postponement; Dr. Al Jaber framing of UAE's resolve 'only grows' provides institutional balance. An adviser to the UAE president appeared to blame Iran and the 'axis of resistance' — but this is one adviser, not the official UAE position.
recent_signals.verification: UAE MbZ as one of three Gulf mediator-requesters = CONFIRMED ACTION (Trump primary); UAE no formal Iran-attribution on Barakah = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Iran no acknowledgement or denial Day 2 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: **UAE BARAKAH NUCLEAR ENERGY PLANT PERIMETER STRIKE MAY 17 — FIRST NUCLEAR-INFRASTRUCTURE-ADJACENT KINETIC OF CYCLE.** UAE Ministry of Defence: 3 drones entered UAE from western border, 2 intercepted, 1 caused fire at electrical generator outside inner perimeter of Barakah Nuclear Energy Plant in Al Dhafra. IAEA expressed 'grave concern'; radiation levels normal; all units operating. Source cluster: Times of Israel, Al Jazeera, The National, Fortune, Fox News, PBS, IAEA primary — 6+ independent. **Categorically new escalation tier** (nuclear-infrastructure-adjacent, even if perimeter not core). Same weekend as Saudi drone interception (B1 — 3 drones from Iraqi airspace; UAE MoFA formal condemnation May 18 = GCC unity signal). Iran has not addressed; attribution UNCLAIMED (operationally consistent with Iran-aligned proxy deniable harassment). **Markets cascade fires Monday**: Brent +2.0% to $111.47 (StanChart $130-145 path activates — 2-session sustain met); USD/INR ₹96.29 record (₹96 trigger fires); Sensex/Nifty -1.30%/-1.04%; energy-sector XLE +2.4%. The Barakah perimeter event is one of the principal drivers per markets dossier C1 chain. **Tuesday May 19 Trump NSC meeting is the operational binary** — Day 1 of 6 remaining in the NYT 'as soon as next week' window. **Iran's prior 'punishment of US-aligned host' pattern intensifies**: Newsweek-confirmed cumulative >2,800 Iranian missiles/drones at UAE territory (more than any other country) plus April 8 UAE Mirage 2000-9 Lavan strike — UAE remains the only confirmed third combatant; UAE remains fully exposed kinetic surface vs Iran. **Recommend: create uae-barakah-nuclear-plant new node** (per markets-dossier proposal); add iran→uae-barakah-nuclear-plant edge at weight 7.0 (1st-order kinetic, nuclear-symbolic).
sources: UAE Ministry of Defence May 17 statement (primary)
Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary
Markets dossier 2026-05-18 Section A + C1 + E (uae-barakah-nuclear-plant new node proposal)
Intel dossier 2026-05-18 B1 (Saudi drone intercept companion event)
recent_signals.verification: Barakah perimeter drone strike = CONFIRMED ACTION (UAE MoD primary + IAEA + 6+ outlets); fire at electrical generator outside inner perimeter = CONFIRMED (UAE MoD primary); radiation levels normal + all units operating = CONFIRMED (IAEA + UAE primary); attribution = UNCLAIMED through search window (operationally consistent with deniable harassment, REPORTED on Iran-aligned proxy speculation only); cascade to brent-crude +2.0% = CONFIRMED operational tape (Investing/Barchart).

recent_signals.headline: **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI USED DELHI PLATFORM TO DIRECTLY THREATEN UAE FROM BRICS-FM TABLE — 'Iranian FM threatens UAE, claims Tehran knew of Netanyahu's visit to Abu Dhabi'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). Iran's top diplomat sat at BRICS table on Indian soil with India's FM and China's FM and publicly threatened UAE — a confirmed third combatant per WSJ Lavan disclosure. UAE has NOT publicly responded; UAE state-aligned media institutional silence continues. **A10 REUTERS AMPLIFIES SAUDI-STRIKES STORY** — Reuters May 12-13 cited 'two Western officials and two Iranian officials': 'Saudi Arabia made Iran aware of the strikes and this was followed by intensive diplomatic engagement and Saudi threats to retaliate further, which led to an understanding between the two countries to de-escalate.' SAUDI-IRAN/UAE-IRAN TRAJECTORIES NOW BIFURCATING: Riyadh paid price of engagement and exited; **Abu Dhabi remains operationally engaged with no de-escalation understanding disclosed**. The National (Abu Dhabi) ran 'Why Indian PM Modi's UAE visit matters beyond bilateral headlines' May 14 with energy-security framing and **ZERO engagement of UAE's confirmed combatant role**. Khaleej Times ran energy-pacts framing (LPG, strategic petroleum reserve cooperation). Modi flies UAE May 15 — first leg of 5-nation tour. UAE Tadawul (TASI) flat-to-down -0.2% 1D / -4.1% 1M = Saudi/Gulf NOT participating in EM rally; direct frontline-state-exposure equity premium being progressively un-priced — suggests local investors closer to situation than global flow.

recent_signals.verification: Araghchi UAE threat from Delhi = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary); UAE silence = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (no UAE MoFA statement at filing); Reuters Saudi-strikes amplification + Riyadh-Tehran de-escalation = REPORTED (multi-cluster basis strengthened from yesterday but Saudi/Iran institutionally silent — NOT promoted to CONFIRMED); TASI tape = CONFIRMED (yfinance).

recent_signals.headline: A10 NEWSWEEK + WSJ + 2 Western + 2 Iranian officials May 12-13: SAUDI ARABIA LAUNCHED SECRET STRIKES AGAINST IRAN IN LATE MARCH ('tit-for-tat retaliation when Saudi was hit') ON TOP OF YESTERDAY'S UAE-LAVAN WSJ DISCLOSURE (April 8 Mirage 2000-9). Newsweek separately reports Iran has fired >2,800 missiles/drones at UAE territory cumulatively — MORE THAN AT ANY OTHER COUNTRY — Iran's prior 'punishment of US-aligned host' framing now confirmed retaliation against fully kinetic third combatant. One of the UAE Lavan-response strikes reported as COORDINATED WITH ISRAEL. Saudi has not publicly acknowledged; Iran silent; Al Hadath (Saudi) editorial distance on UAE story but silent on Saudi-strikes. **B5 PM MODI 5-NATION TOUR CONFIRMED MAY 15-20 (UAE first, then Netherlands/Sweden/Norway/Italy); explicit UAE focus on 'energy security for India amid US-Iran war' + Comprehensive Strategic Partnership (Khaleej Times, India TV, The Print, US News).** Modi will land in UAE May 15 (now confirmed covert combatant) in a more politically loaded environment than even yesterday's reading anticipated, while Iran FM Araghchi is in Delhi for BRICS May 13-14 — Modi's most overt strategic-autonomy choreography of cycle. No Indian outlet has editorialised against Modi visiting UAE knowing UAE struck Iran — diaspora-base ~3.5M Indians in UAE makes anti-UAE framing politically unworkable. The National (Abu Dhabi) ran Trump-Beijing 'overshadowed by Iran war' piece but did NOT engage Lavan or Saudi-strikes; Khaleej Times ran Modi visit factually with zero editorial framing of UAE's covert combatant role — UAE state-aligned media treating both stories as something to wait out, same kid-gloves silence as yesterday.

recent_signals.headline: WSJ MAY 11 (MAJOR RETROACTIVE REVELATION): UAE AIR FORCE SECRETLY STRUCK IRAN'S LAVAN ISLAND OIL REFINERY APRIL 8 USING MIRAGE 2000-9 (55,000 bpd capacity offline months) — UAE moves from passive US host with hawkish air defense to THE ONLY THIRD COUNTRY TO JOIN US-ISRAEL KINETIC OPERATIONS AGAINST IRAN. 'Washington reportedly positively received Abu Dhabi's participation.' UAE has not publicly acknowledged. Iran silent on WSJ exposure (operational response IS prior UAE-targeted strikes retroactively reframed). REFRAMES regional alignment: Iran's March/April UAE-targeted missile/drone strikes were direct retaliation for confirmed covert UAE offensive ops, not just 'targeting US-aligned Gulf hosts.' Saudi visibly distancing (denied via Al-Hadath May 8 airspace use for offensive). The National (UAE state-aligned) conspicuously absent from leading WSJ story — UAE state-aligned media treating WSJ scoop as something to wait out. Modi 5-nation tour May 15-20 (UAE first leg) materially complicated by Lavan revelation — India engaging with only third combatant nation simultaneously with diversification framing. UAE airspace partial closure post-Fujairah ended ~May 11.

recent_signals.verification: UAE Lavan April 8 strike via Mirage 2000-9 = REPORTED (WSJ primary, single-source on full operational details; UAE has not publicly acknowledged); Saudi denial of offensive airspace use = CONFIRMED DIPLOMATIC SIGNAL via Al-Hadath; UAE state-aligned media non-engagement = CONFIRMED via The National's conspicuous absence from leading the story; Iran-side prior UAE-targeted strikes are the implicit operational response (CONFIRMED ACTION); explicit Iranian re-attribution NOT made publicly

recent_signals.headline: UAE AIR-DEFENSE ENGAGEMENT MAY 8 SCALE REFINED (UPDATED — yesterday's brief understated): 2 BALLISTIC MISSILES + 3 DRONES LAUNCHED BY IRAN TOWARD UAE; 3 PEOPLE WOUNDED CONFIRMED PER UAE DEFENSE MINISTRY; not clear whether all incoming weapons were intercepted. Strike followed CENTCOM's same-day announcement of thwarting attacks on three US Navy ships in Strait of Hormuz. SECOND major UAE-targeted Iranian attack of cycle (first: May 4 Fujairah refinery strike). UAE now demonstrably on IRGC operational targeting list. Gulf bifurcation now operationally specific: UAE (Iranian targets / hawkish), Bahrain (US-aligned counter-IRGC, 41 arrests May 9), Qatar (mediating via IRGC contacts), Saudi (deniable-operational + public-pro-mediation), Oman (silent), Kuwait (denied airspace). The Saudi-UAE structural overhang persists.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED ACTION (UAE Defense Ministry primary; 3 wounded confirmed; 2 ballistic + 3 drones; multi-source AP wire); Iran has not officially claimed but Tasnim/Iranian state media did not deny

recent_signals.headline: UAE LEAVES OPEC AND OPEC+ EFFECTIVE MAY 1 — BIGGEST STRUCTURAL OPEC DEVELOPMENT IN A DECADE; BESSENT DOLLAR-SWAP-LINE NE
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED via UAE state media (The National) + 7+

historical_summaries.summary: 1 signals. Iran struck US Consulate in Dubai, Dubai International Airport, and Fairmont The Palm hotel in initial retaliation wave

5 signals. ADNOC Ruwais refinery (UAE's largest, 922K bpd capacity) shut down after Iranian drone strike caused fire | Iran struck Shah gas field (set ablaze) and Fujairah port (key oil hub used as Hormuz bypass) | IRGC threatened US university campuses in Gulf on March 29, specifically naming NYU Abu Dhabi

15 signals. UAE described as 'perhaps the most hawkish' among Gulf allies, pushing for ground invasion of Iran (WaPo national security desk) | Al-Salmi VLCC (Kuwait-flagged, 2M bbl Saudi/Kuwaiti oil for China) struck at Dubai port anchorage March 31 — most significant single-vessel | CONFIRMED: Borouge petrochemical plant ($60B, world's largest single-site polyolefin plant) SHUT DOWN operations at Ruwais Industrial Comple
